heading: Data on nonimmigrant overstay rates
label: 1376 Data on nonimmigrant overstay rates
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Immigration and Nationality Act which comprises this chapter.

Abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service and Transfer of FunctionsFor abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service, transfer of functions, and treatment of related references, see note set out under .section 1551 of this title

children.heading: Collection of data
children.label: a Collection of data
children.text: Not later than the date that is 180 days after , the Attorney General shall implement a program to collect data, for each fiscal year, regarding the total number of aliens within each of the classes of nonimmigrant aliens described in whose authorized period of stay in the United States terminated during the previous fiscal year, but who remained in the United States notwithstanding such termination.April 27, 1998section 1101(a)(15) of this title

children.heading: Annual report
children.label: b Annual report
children.text: Not later than , and not later than June 30 of each year thereafter, the Attorney General shall submit an annual report to the Congress providing numerical estimates, for each country for the preceding fiscal year, of the number of aliens from the country who are described in subsection (a).June 30, 1999
